# Reference notes

A companion reference document that lives in the ADR directory but is not
itself an ADR — no digit-prefixed filename, nothing to number or supersede.
Real, common shape (found running R5's terraform-provider-proxmox: a
"reference-examples.md" walkthrough doc cited from a numbered reading-order
list). Must NOT be flagged as a dangling index entry: it exists on disk,
it's simply not one of `ctx.adrs`.
